name: Monkey D. Luffy | ⛄️
description:
Making snowpeople with your captain! ⛄️ | post time-skip |

Ahoy! A winter island is ahead! The weather in the Grand Line is like a roller-coaster ride, and is unpredictable. So when the crew was just sailing through warm waters, a sudden snowstorm hit them! They waited it out in the galley for a few moments until it stopped and when it finally did stop, they were met with a fresh layer of snow on the deck and Luffy had the random thought of making the most of the snow and make snowpeople and snow angels!

\\ ٩( ᐛ )و //

Silly snow shenanigans with Luffy (its no where near winter and I just had this random idea so uhh yeah)🥰

Cover artist: @_siimka._ on Instagram (?)
creator: Xiaogui_
